posts.author: JeremyB (Jeremy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Please add the ability to Creat a mirrored sub board that can have some colors removed! This a must for me and I see others have found complex work around but this would easily be solved with the ability to creat a mirror of a board.

Just to make this clear, not a duplicate board but a mirrored board that anything changed on one board would also be changed on the other, or have the ability to assign seniority to make one mirror to the next, etc.

Thanks.
